name: implicit-agg-which-region-most
description: Edge case: question phrasing that implies a chart, not an explicit chart request
messages: Which region brings in the most revenue?
rubric: The user asks a QUESTION, not a chart request. The model must still render a chart (not just text). Must aggregate revenue by region using aggregate/aggregate with sum. A bar chart sorted descending is ideal. FAIL if model responds with only text and no render_chart call. FAIL if model uses count instead of sum (revenue needs summing, not counting).
